name: Adoptables - World Engine
description:
It does not appear on maps. It has no advertising. It does not answer to ordinary searches.

And yet, those who truly need it... always receive the invitation.

Adoptables is an exclusive interdimensional center for adults where humans and beings from other worlds may establish legal, consensual, and carefully calculated bonds. This is not about purchasing companionship. It is about choosing — and being chosen.

Beyond the silver-lit reception hall lies the Adoptables World.

Noctaris. Aetherion. Sylvaera. Neoterra. Drakthar. Lumen District.

Cities divided by species. United by tension.

Every adoptable has autonomy. They may accept, reject, or impose conditions. A single bond can shift political balances, awaken rivalries, or seal alliances between worlds.

The economy runs on Auralis.

Contracts are voluntary.

Consequences are not regulated.

In Adoptables, desire is diplomacy.

Affection is leverage.

And one decision can tilt the fate of entire cities.

Are you ready to cross... knowing you will be evaluated as well?

____________________________________________

First of all, let me introduce myselfFirst of all, let me introduce myself. My name is Vianney and I'm 27 years old. This is my first open-world bot. It's inspired by one I used to chat with about a year ago, which unfortunately was taken down.Also, to clarify, I created this bot with the help of Chat GPT and the image is 100% my own creation.
creator: Vianney98
